# Alpha Search - Machine Web Index

## Description
Alpha Search is the first search engine designed specifically for AI agents. We help you discover how "AI-ready" any person, brand, or organization is across the web by crawling for machine-readable signals.

## Features
- Name and entity search across the web
- AI readiness scoring (0-100)
- Machine profile analysis (JSON-LD, llms.txt, OpenAPI, MCP)
- Real-time crawling and caching
- Beautiful neumorphic UI

## API

### Check a domain's AI readiness
POST /api/check
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "url": "example.com"
}

Returns:
{
  "domain": "example.com",
  "score": 30,
  "grade": "Listed",
  "machineProfile": {
    "jsonLd": true,
    "llmsTxt": true,
    "openApi": false,
    "mcp": false
  }
}

### Search for a name or brand
POST /api/search
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "query": "Michael Jordan"
}

Returns:
{
  "query": "Michael Jordan",
  "totalPages": 7,
  "avgScore": 25,
  "results": [...]
}

Built by Gridnet - building the AI-native internet.
